title: Glassy-Jelly Canadian Single Cream Bake
description: A show-off Canadian dessert featuring a pungent glassy-jelly topping, single cream, and a delicate bake. Serve chilled with a side of fresh berries.
instructions: Line an 8-inch square baking dish with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and eggs until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Allow the bake to cool completely in the pan.
In a small saucepan, combine the single cream and vanilla extract. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until the cream has thickened slightly and reduced by about half.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Pour the glassy jelly topping over the cooled bake, spreading it evenly to cover the surface.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or until set and just before serving.
